title: analyst agent output
description: Machine-readable summary returned by the analyst agent after a PRD-quality review. Mirrors the Output Format section of agents/analyst.md.

verdict.description: Overall disposition: PROCEED = no blockers; PROCEED_WITH_FOLLOWUPS = minor items noted; FIX_REQUIRED = HIGH findings that must be addressed before wave execution; BLOCKED = cannot complete review.

report_path.description: Relative path to the human-readable audit file written to .orchestrator/audits/.

scope_drift_count.description: Number of scope-drift items detected (brainstorm items missing from plan, or plan items with no brainstorm trace).

blockers.description: Free-text blocker descriptions; empty array when verdict is not BLOCKED.
